# Generated by tools/m8_knowledge.py --write; M8 disables vanilla advancement gameplay.
# Keys and their dependent trigger references remain valid for loaded vanilla script.
scandinavian_fishing_privileges_advance = {
	age = age_1_traditions
	potential = {
		always = no # M8 disables vanilla advancement
		culture = { has_culture_group = culture_group:scandinavian_group }
	}

	unlock_town_rights = scandinavian_fishing_privileges

	requires = distribution_of_power_advance
}

	age = age_1_traditions
	potential = {
		always = no # M8 disables vanilla advancement
		culture = { has_culture_group = culture_group:scandinavian_group }
	}

	unlock_town_rights = scandinavian_bergslag_privileges

	requires = distribution_of_power_advance
}

scandinavian_thing_rights_advance = {
	age = age_1_traditions
	potential = {
		always = no # M8 disables vanilla advancement
		culture = { has_culture_group = culture_group:scandinavian_group }
	}

	unlock_town_rights = scandinavian_thing_rights

	requires = distribution_of_power_advance
}

scandinavian_tar_privileges_advance = {
	age = age_1_traditions
	potential = {
		always = no # M8 disables vanilla advancement
		culture = { has_culture_group = culture_group:scandinavian_group }
	}

	unlock_town_rights = scandinavian_tar_privileges

	requires = scandinavian_bergslag_privileges_advance
